---
title: "Maternal Health Risk Classifier"
description: "Support Vector Classifier to predict maternal health risk tiers from IoT sensor data."
date: "2024-08"
categories: [Python, Machine Learning, Classification]
---

## Overview

Engineered a Support Vector Classifier (SVC) to predict maternal health risk tiers using processed IoT data, achieving 77% overall accuracy and 91% recall (0.943 AUC) for critical identification of at-risk mothers.

## Approach

- Processed IoT health sensor data for feature engineering
- Trained and tuned a Support Vector Classifier across multiple risk tiers
- Prioritized recall to minimize missed high-risk cases

## Results

| Metric | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| Overall Accuracy | 77% |
| High-Risk Recall | 91% |
| AUC | 0.943 |

## Tools & Technologies

- Python
- scikit-learn (SVC)
- IoT health data
